narrative:
Beachwood City has 10,182 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 6.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 39.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 32.6 percentage points.
